Twin Cities Startup Week 2018

Monday, October 8
 

7:00am CDT

Free Workout with Alchemy
Monday October 8, 2018 7:00am - 8:00am CDT
Alchemy Northeast
Alchemy combines yoga, strength, and intense conditioning to change the body and renew the mind. The A10 format will be 40 minutes and consists of a dynamic yoga warm-up, 10 minutes of high intensity followed by a power yoga cool-down. Every class starts with an overview of the workout structure followed by demos of the movements and modifications. Walk in antsy, walk out feeling more alive.
Monday October 8, 2018 7:00am - 8:00am CDT
Alchemy Northeast 120 SE 3rd Ave, Minneapolis, MN 55414
  Fitness Class

JUST ADDED: Scaling Within: Expand Your Internal Capacity to Sustain External Growth Session 1
Monday October 8, 2018 8:00am - 9:00am CDT
Honest Studios (right next to Spyhouse North Loop)
In order to successfully scale your venture, you must first learn to scale within. That is, you must expand your internal capacity to lead yourself and others well as your company develops over time. Minnesota History Center

Monday October 8, 2018 10:00am - 11:00am CDT

Low-Cost Validation: What We've Learned From Helping 100+ Startups
Monday October 8, 2018 1:30pm - 2:30pm CDT
Fueled Collective
If you're serious about your web or mobile app idea, it's critical to prove it's viable before spending the big bucks to develop it. We'll share our proven framework to validate idea stage startups, a list of powerful yet low-cost validation tools you can use, and we'll interview 3 Twin Cities founders to get an inside look at their idea stage tips and tricks.

Dustin Bruzenak is CEO of Modern Logic, a digital innovation agency. In past lives he's been a lead developer at Adobe and founded several software businesses.
Friday October 12, 2018 3:00pm - 4:00pm CDT
Fueled Collective Downtown. Parking vouchers may be available. We will be in "The Classroom" 401 400 S 4th St, 1411, Minneapolis, MN 55415
  Community Event, Product Design

3:00pm CDT

Begin with the End in Mind: This Endeavor is a Smashing Success...Now What?
Friday October 12, 2018 3:00pm - 5:00pm CDT
EPIQ Partners
Entrepreneurs begin their endeavors for a variety of reasons. Primary among them is to make a dent in the universe and growth in their bank accounts. Hear from mavens of the Twin Cities startup eco-system about the intentional things one can do (perhaps because they didn’t) at the outset that will make a difference in your successful venture.
Speakers

EPIQ Partners (Host)

Chris Carlisle

Partner, Gray Plant Mooty
Chair of the M&A, Venture Capital and Emerging Company Teams. Helping Entrepreneurs in Business and Life.

Bruce Langer

Managing Partner, EPIQ Partners, LLC
Collaborator with successful entrepreneurs seeking EPIQ investment results

Scott Litman

Co-Founder, Managing Partner, Equals 3
Scott Litman has been labeled the "sales godfather" of our local tech startup community by some wildly respected founders. He has a dangerous skill set that includes being able to sell both tech product AND service equally well while being a leader his teammates respect. He led Magnet360... Read More →

Vicki Raport

Friday October 12, 2018 3:00pm - 5:00pm CDT
EPIQ Partners 2919 Knox Ave S #200 Minneapolis, MN 55408
  Community Event, Startup Basics

4:00pm CDT

Why Disrupting Education is So Hard
Friday October 12, 2018 4:00pm - 5:30pm CDT
WeWork Capella Tower - 39th Floor
There is no shortage of problems to solve in education. So, why is disrupting education so hard?Join Curt Johnson - who literally wrote the book on disruption in education - and DeLonn Crosby, who is trying to write the next chapter for a candid discussion on:- The current state of US education- What disruption is (and isn't) and a summary of obstacles preventing innovation- Potential solutions /...
See More →
Speakers

EduCharacter (Host)

DeLonn Crosby

SayKid
DeLonn is Founder and CEO of SayKid, an education technology company that has developed a screen-free, play-based learning platform. SayKid combines voice technology with tangible play to help kids learn in a more active and engaging way - without screens!

Visit https://saykid.com to learn more... Read More →

Curtis Johnson

Chairman, Education Evolving
Curtis Johnson is the Chairman of Education Evolving and co-authored, "Disrupting Class" with Harvard Business School Professor, Clayton Christensen and Michael Horn. For nearly 30 years, he has contributed to the advancement of major policy innovations in education. Curtis has a... Read More →
Friday October 12, 2018 4:00pm - 5:30pm CDT
WeWork Capella Tower - 39th Floor 225 South 6th St, Minneapolis, MN 55402
  Education Tech and Training Track, EdTech

6:00pm CDT

Twin Cities Startup Awards and Twin Cities Startup Week Closing Party - *External Registration Required*
Friday October 12, 2018 6:00pm - 10:00pm CDT
Uppercut Boxing Gym
Our great state of Minnesota is home to hundreds of great inventors, innovators, and entrepreneurs. Isn't it time we get to know and celebrate these fearless explorers? GoKart Labs has partnered with Twin Cities Startup Week to host an event to honor these individuals.We want to recognize and celebrate all they do for their community and business, but we need your help! 7:45am CDT

Day Three - BITCON2018 *External Registration Required*
Saturday October 13, 2018 7:45am - 5:00pm CDT
The Inaugural Blacks in Technology Conference, instantly tagged as BITCON2018, is a 3-day interactive platform for professionals, entrepreneurs, influencers, subject matter experts, students, and thought leaders who share a common goal... increasing the visibility and representation of black men and women in the tech industry.  As we seek to further our mission of establishing a practice of...

1:00pm CDT

Design It!: A Hack-a-thon for Kids and Families *External Ticket Required*
Saturday October 13, 2018 1:00pm - 4:00pm CDT
The Works Museum
Snag Your External Ticket
The Works Museum and Shattuck St. Mary's School are hosting TCSW's first ever kid-parent event! Bar + Arcade @ BITCON
Saturday October 13, 2018 5:00pm - 10:00pm CDT
Impact Hub & Finnovation Lab
Snag Your External Ticket
Remember the friendship ending joy you felt of launching a blue shell?  Remember finally fireballing M. Bison to death?  Dust off that controller and flex your video game prowess at the BiT Barcade at Finnegans!  Show off your speed in Mario Kart, your moves in Super Smash Bros, combos in Street Fighter and building skills in Fortnite.
